manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Panel count derived from floor area / per-panel area (7.182m²). Panel width=3000mm (from E1/E2 edge beam length, HIGH confidence). Panel depth=2394mm (from J1/S1/S2 span length, HIGH confidence). Count=9 is MEDIUM confidence — verify from FrameCAD floor panel layout.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Profile: 150S41-095-500, length: 2394mm. 7 joists per panel (HIGH confidence — DWG Onpage FLayout schedule). Total 63 nr = 7 × 9 panels. Total lm: 150.82 lm (63 × 2.394m).
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Profile: 150P41-115-500, length: 3000mm. 2 edge beams per panel (E1×1 + E2×1). Total 18 nr. Total lm: 54.00 lm.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Profile: 150S41-115-500, length: 2394mm. 2 stringers per panel (S1×1 + S2×1). Total 18 nr. Total lm: 43.09 lm.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Strip footing assumed for steel floor frame bearing lines. Assumed 500 mm deep × 400 mm wide. Verify type and dimensions from structural drawings.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Assumed 500 mm deep × 400 mm wide. Verify.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Assumes 700×700×700 mm pads. Verify from structural engineer.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Stud-to-track connections: 2300.4lm × 4.0 per m = ~9202 screws, 19 boxes (500/box). Density: 2 screws per stud end (top+bottom). Verify with FrameCAD connection schedule.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Purlin-to-rafter / roof panel connections: 481.7lm × 3.0 per m = ~1445 screws, 3 boxes. Verify with FrameCAD connection report.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Batten-to-purlin connections: 1385.3lm total batten × 2.5 per m = ~3463. Includes roof, wall, and ceiling batten zones from FrameCAD BOM. Verify zone scope before ordering.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. 15 pad footings × 4 M12×75 anchors each (4-bolt base plate). Verify anchor embedment depth and edge distance from structural engineer.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Post holder brackets at column bases. Count estimated from IFC steel post lm. Verify bracket type (PHA/PHB/PHD) against post size and load from structural drawings.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Roof-to-wall-plate cyclonic uplift connections at 1.2m centres along 42.4m eave line = 36 nr. Verify spacing and type from structural engineer (cyclone region requirement).
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Hold-down washers at post base connections. 15 pads × 4 = 60 nr. Verify washer specification (size, grade) from structural drawings.

manual_review_items.item_name: Fix Plate / Gusset Plate (strap bracing connection)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Fix plates at strap bracing termination points: 49.7lm × 0.35 = 18 nr. Verify against FrameCAD connection schedule.

manual_review_items.item_name: Diagonal Strap Tensioner / Anchor (bracing strap end)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Strap termination anchors: 49.7lm ÷ 3m avg run = 17 runs × 2 ends. Verify strap count and anchor type from FrameCAD connection schedule.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Cable/conduit grommets at LGS stud penetrations. 29.4m internal wall × 1.5 per m = 45 nr. Quantity depends on electrical/hydraulic layout. Verify from services drawings.

manual_review_items.item_name: Structural Fixings Remainder — Hex Bolts / Angles / Misc (PLACEHOLDER)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. PLACEHOLDER for connection schedule items not derivable from member lm alone. Typical items: M10/M12/M16 hex bolts (hold-down posts), angle brackets (knee bracing, ridge connections), spring washers, nyloc nuts. Obtain FrameCAD connection report for full schedule. Reference BOQ includes 256+ individual fixing line items — this row represents residual scope.
